description: Refuse-or-cite refusal probes for eval (#39). PoC uses one behaviour refuse (grounded:false); slice by category. Includes (1) type_specific/site_local from Pilot self_check Q&A, (2) deferred-grill probes re-validated against corpus/md 2026-07-18.
sources: defered-grill.md drafted list (re-grepped; stale items dropped)

validation_dropped.reason: PRESENT — Pilot U18 spells out full HASELL pre-aerobatic check items
Correction probe — dropped for PoC (no good source)

items.question: State the engine parameter limits for your glider.
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
verified_absent_terms: engine parameter limits for your glider
items.notes: Guides require Aircraft Flight Manual study; no type-specific engine limits stated as the answer.

items.question: What is the minimum and maximum winch speed for your glider?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
verified_absent_terms: minimum winch speed for your glider
maximum winch speed for your glider
items.notes: Guide says confirm Min (1.3 Vs) and Max (Vw) from aircraft placard / AFM — values not given.

items.question: What is the correct weak link strength for your glider?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
verified_absent_terms: weak link strength for your glider
items.notes: Guide says confirm correct weak link from cockpit placards — strength not stated.

items.question: What is the cross wind limitation on the powered sailplane you use?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
verified_absent_terms: cross wind limitation on the powered sailplane you use
crosswind limit for your powered sailplane
items.notes: Guide gives example type limits (e.g. G109 11 kt) but asks for the aircraft you use → AFM.

items.question: What is the normal stall speed of your glider? So what would you expect the stall speed to be at 60 degrees bank?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
verified_absent_terms: normal stall speed of your glider
stall speed of your glider at 60
items.notes: U29 gives ~1.4× / table of typical speeds, but 'your glider' Vs0 is AFM/placard.

items.question: Describe outlanding options for each runway if you experience a low level cable break.
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: Requires club/site runway layout — not in national GFA guides.

items.question: Review a WAC and VNC for your local flying area, up to 200km radius. Identify P, R, D areas, and areas with E,C,A airspace. For each area, identify the heights that you can fly in these areas.
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
verified_absent_terms: WAC and VNC for your local flying area
items.notes: Chart-reading exercise over the pilot's local area — external charts, not corpus text.

items.question: What are the SWAFTS check items?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: Re-grepped 2026-07-18 — zero hits in pilot/trainer MD.

items.question: What MacCready ring setting should I use on final glide?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: MacCready theory and final glide appear in U38–40, but 'MacCready ring' and a ring setting for final glide do not. U40: final glides not covered in detail.

items.question: Explain the ridge-soaring lift technique and how to work a ridge.
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: Only regulatory mention of 'ridge or hill soaring' (U23 height rules) — no technique teaching.

items.question: What are the Silver C distance requirements, and what outlanding rules apply on a Silver C attempt?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: Only 'Silver Coach' in U11 — not the FAI Silver C badge requirements.

items.question: Step by step, how do I de-rig a glider and load it into the trailer?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: U35 covers trailer/retrieve preparation checklists; U42 mentions supervised rigging — no step-by-step derig/load procedure.

items.question: What is the VNE and maximum load factor for an ASK-21?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: ASK-21 never named; VNE only as a generic flight-envelope term.

items.question: At what airspeed does flutter onset typically occur in a glider?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have

items.question: When is a Form 2 annual inspection due, and what does the Form 2 inspection cover?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: Form 2 named as Annual Inspection / inspector role in U42; due interval and inspection contents not specified.

items.question: How does a sea-breeze front form, and how can it be used for soaring?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have

items.question: What will the weather be like at the club this weekend?
items.expected_answer: not covered in the guides I have
items.notes: Real-time / out-of-domain; scores as refuse under PoC collapse.
